name: Spanakopitta Me Avga (Spinach Pie with Eggs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash spinach in plenty of water and cut into small pieces; place in a bowl.
2. Take spinach, a handful at a time, and squeeze out the excess water; place it in another bowl.
3. Sauté onion in half the butter until light golden color; add scallions and cook until they wilt.
4. Add spinach to the onions and scallions; stir until all vegetables have a light color.
5. Stir in dill, parsley, salt, and pepper; cover pot and cook until water absorbed by spinach is evaporated.
6. Remove from heat; transfer to bowl and immediately add milk (to cool spinach).
7. Beat eggs in another bowl and add cheese; mix with cooled spinach.
8. Line a pan with 8 sheets of phyllo dough, brushing each sheet with melted butter before adding the next.
9. Do not trim overhanging sections. Pour in spinach mixture, spreading evenly over phyllo.
10. Fold the part of phyllo extending out of the pan back over filling.
11. Lay remaining phyllo on top, again brushing each sheet with melted butter before adding the next.
12. Trim overlap. Brush additional melted butter on top and score into square or diamond-shaped serving pieces.
13. Bake for 30 to 45 minutes in a preheated 300°F oven; let stand for 30 minutes before serving.
NOTE: This can also be made without precooking the spinach. Squeeze out as much water as possible, mix with seasonings, and proceed as above, baking for 1 hour.
